# kSecClassInternetPassword

**Global Variable**

The value that indicates an Internet password item.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecClassInternetPassword: CFString
```

## Discussion

The following keychain item attributes form the composite primary key of an Internet password item:

- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccessGroup] (on macOS, this key only applies if you set [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecUseDataProtectionKeychain] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSynchronizable] to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true])
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccount]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAuthenticationType]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrPath]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrPort]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrProtocol]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSecurityDomain]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrServer]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSynchronizable]

Calls to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemAdd(_:_:)] that add an Internet password item with the same values for all of these attributes as an existing item result in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/errSecDuplicateItem].

The following keychain item attributes apply to an Internet password item, and don’t form part of its composite primary key:

- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccess] (macOS only)
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrAccessible] (on macOS, this key only applies if you set [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecUseDataProtectionKeychain] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrSynchronizable] to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true])
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCreationDate]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrModificationDate]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrDescription]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrComment]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrCreator]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrType]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrLabel]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrIsInvisible]
- [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecAttrIsNegative]
